Fact.Name: Minister/Form 4361 checkbox
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line A. Minister, member of a religious order, or Christian Science practitioner who filed Form 4361 with $400 or more of other net earnings from self-employment.

Fact.Name: Net farm profit or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 1a. Net farm profit or (loss) from Schedule F, line 34, and farm partnerships, Schedule K-1 (Form 1065), box 14, code A.

Fact.Name: Conservation Reserve Program payments
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 1b. Conservation Reserve Program payments included on Schedule F, line 4b, or listed on Schedule K-1 (Form 1065), box 20, code AQ. Entered as a positive amount; subtracted in line 3.

Fact.Name: Net nonfarm profit or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 2. Net profit or (loss) from Schedule C, line 31; and Schedule K-1 (Form 1065), box 14, code A (other than farming).

Fact.Name: Combined SE income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 3. Combine lines 1a, 1b, and 2. Skips 1a/1b when farm optional method elected; skips 2 when nonfarm optional method elected.

Fact.Name: Adjusted SE income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 4a. If line 3 is more than zero, multiply line 3 by 92.35% (0.9235). Otherwise, enter amount from line 3.

Fact.Name: Optional method income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 4b. Total of lines 15 and 17 if optional methods elected.

Fact.Name: Combined adjusted SE income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 4c. Combine lines 4a and 4b. If less than $400, enter 0 (no SE tax owed). Exception: if less than $400 and church employee income, enter 0 and continue.

Fact.Name: Church employee income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 5a. Church employee income from Form W-2.

Fact.Name: Adjusted church employee income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 5b. Multiply line 5a by 92.35% (0.9235). If less than $100, enter 0.

Fact.Name: Net SE earnings
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 6. Add lines 4c and 5b.

Fact.Name: Maximum social security earnings
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 7. Maximum amount of combined wages and self-employment earnings subject to social security tax for 2025.

Fact.Name: Social security wages and tips
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 8a. Total social security wages and tips (total of boxes 3 and 7 on Form(s) W-2) and railroad retirement (tier 1) compensation.

Fact.Name: Unreported tips
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 8b. Unreported tips subject to social security tax from Form 4137, line 10.

Fact.Name: Wages from Form 8919
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 8c. Wages subject to social security tax from Form 8919, line 10.

Fact.Name: Total social security wages
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 8d. Add lines 8a, 8b, and 8c.

Fact.Name: Remaining SS allowance
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 9. Subtract line 8d from line 7. If zero or less, enter 0.

Fact.Name: Social security tax
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 10. Multiply the smaller of line 6 or line 9 by 12.4% (0.124).

Fact.Name: Medicare tax
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 11. Multiply line 6 by 2.9% (0.029).

Fact.Name: Self-employment tax
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 12. Add lines 10 and 11. Enter on Schedule 2 (Form 1040), line 4.

Fact.Name: SE tax deduction
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 13. Multiply line 12 by 50% (0.50). Enter on Schedule 1 (Form 1040), line 15.

Fact.Name: Use farm optional method
Fact.Description: Schedule SE Part II. Elect to use the farm optional method. Causes lines 1a and 1b to be skipped in line 3.

Fact.Name: Use nonfarm optional method
Fact.Description: Schedule SE Part II. Elect to use the nonfarm optional method. Causes line 2 to be skipped in line 3.

Fact.Name: Maximum optional method income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 14. Maximum income for optional methods.

Fact.Name: Farm optional method income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 15. Enter the smaller of: two-thirds of gross farm income (not less than zero) or $7,240. Only used when farm optional method is elected.

Fact.Name: Remaining optional method cap
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 16. Subtract line 15 from line 14.

Fact.Name: Nonfarm optional method income
Fact.Description: Schedule SE line 17. Enter the smaller of: two-thirds of gross nonfarm income (not less than zero) or the amount on line 16. Only used when nonfarm optional method is elected.
